title: CURIOSITY HOOK: The Question That Opens a Door
content: A flower opens. A star shines. A pen suddenly stops writing. What if each small mystery is inviting you to become a science explorer?

title: CURIOSITY HOOK: Is Science Hiding in Your Lunch Box?
content: Steam rises from hot idli. Rain makes puddles. A magnet closes a pencil box. Is science only in a lab, or is it sitting beside you? Wizkids Gurukula - Grade 6 Science Self-Study Lesson

title: CURIOSITY HOOK: The Pen That Refused to Write
content: Your pen stops in the middle of class. Is the ink over? Is the tip blocked? Before throwing it away, can you solve the mystery like a scientist?

title: CURIOSITY HOOK: Can One Person Find Every Answer?
content: Five children watch the same rain puddle. One notices ripples. One notices mud. One notices floating leaves. What happens when they share?
